_comment: Fixture mirroring the JSON envelope `index opportunity discover "<query>" --json --token <key>` emits, captured against `@indexnetwork/cli` v0.10.3 (probed Day 1, 2026-05-06). Top level is `{success, data, error}` per the CLI source (`src/api.client.ts` + `src/opportunity.command.ts`). The CLI's `data` field is heterogeneous — sometimes an opportunities array, sometimes an envelope object with `{message, opportunities}`. We capture the most useful shape (array of opportunity records carrying protocol/chain/symbol/apy/url) so `lib/indexNetwork.ts` can flow them into the candidate pipeline.

data.title: Audited stable USDC yield on Base via Morpho Blue
data.description: Morpho Blue's STEAKUSDC vault on Base — audited (OpenZeppelin + Spearbit), $470M TVL, 4.0% real APY (apyBase, no inflationary emissions per DefiLlama).

data.title: Aave v3 USDC supply on Base — institutional liquidity
data.description: Aave v3 USDC supply pool on Base with $1B+ TVL, audited by Trail of Bits + OpenZeppelin + Code4rena. Mixed real + inflationary APY.

data.title: Fluid Lending USDC on Base — newer protocol, lower TVL
data.description: Fluid Lending USDC pool on Base. Audit cache hit (Spearbit + Cantina). Smaller $30M TVL means higher concentration risk.
